decisions.name: Layered (N-Tier) Architecture Style
decisions.rationale: To achieve scalability, maintainability, and reusability of the system

decisions.name: Use of GPT-4 model for natural language processing
decisions.rationale: To achieve state-of-the-art natural language processing capabilities

decisions.name: Encryption of user passwords
decisions.rationale: To ensure the security of user data

decisions.name: Use of smartphone connected to the internet with a working camera
decisions.rationale: To enable users to upload images and videos

decisions.name: Availability on Play store for android users and App store for iOS users
decisions.rationale: To ensure the system is accessible to a wide range of users

decisions.name: Use of digital twin technology
decisions.rationale: To enable the creation of personalized avatars

decisions.name: Use of voice cloning technology
decisions.rationale: To enable the creation of personalized avatars with realistic voices

decisions.name: Use of speech-to-text feature
decisions.rationale: To enable users to interact with the avatar through voice commands

decisions.name: Use of text-to-speech feature
decisions.rationale: To enable users to interact with the avatar through text commands

decisions.name: Use of 3D model generation technology
decisions.rationale: To enable the creation of personalized avatars with realistic appearances

decisions.name: Use of AI-powered avatar customization
decisions.rationale: To enable users to customize their avatars to their liking

components.name: User Interface
components.responsibility: Handle user interactions, including uploading images, recording voice, and conversing with the avatar.

components.name: Image Processing
components.responsibility: Convert uploaded images to 3D models and generate lifelike digital twin avatars.

components.name: Voice Cloning
components.responsibility: Clone the user's voice and make the avatar adapt to the user's voice.

components.name: Avatar Customization
components.responsibility: Allow users to customize their avatar's look and express emotions based on images and conversations.

components.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
components.responsibility: Use the GPT-4 model for state-of-the-art natural language processing and respond to user questions.

components.name: Authentication and Authorization
components.responsibility: Handle user sign-up, login, profile editing, and logout functionality.

components.name: Avatar Creation
components.responsibility: Create avatars based on user requirements and make them adapt to the user.

components.name: Emotion Expression
components.responsibility: Make the avatar express emotions based on images and conversations.

components.name: System Administration
components.responsibility: Create accounts for administrators and provide access to system data and features.
